/PROB MOD/PJ:6 MONTHS/CTS:66/X:DEFENDANT IS REMANDED NUNC PRO TUNC TO 10-30-03 AND TO SERVE CJ TIME IN COUNTY JAIL, SWAP ORDER PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED IS VACATED/

/CAL: REQUEST FOR OSC/X: DATE OF 01-14-15 IS CONFIRMED,/
